creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Robert,

I submitted this patch with many other patches related to OCaml: see PR 262781.

Many of these proposed updates depend on Dune: see PR 262783.

Thus I'm not sure if this is possible to commit only devel/ocaml-uutf without the other related PRs, because all these ports are very outdated!

Since it has not been possible to commit this batch of PRs, I do not intend to commit this one alone, but if you tested successfully, please go on.
